metadata.promise: Une aventure magique où votre enfant aide des étoiles perdues à retrouver leur place dans le ciel étoilé
metadata.editorialPositioning: Conte de fées premium belge pour l'heure du coucher, cultivant l'émerveillement et la confiance en soi

book.title_template: La Forêt des Étoiles Perdues avec {child_name}

dedication.text_template: Qui sait que même les plus petits gestes peuvent illuminer le monde entier

page_1.text_template: Sous les racines nouées du grand chêne, {child_name} découvre une étoile pâle qui murmure des secrets de lumière oubliée.

page_2.text_template: Un renard couleur cannelle de Bruges chuchote : « Viens, {child_name}, tes sœurs étoiles dorment dans les fougères ! »

page_3.text_template: La chouette aux yeux de lune révèle : « Les étoiles s'envolent vers leur palais quand les cœurs tendres leur offrent des mélodies. »

page_4.text_template: Paupières closes comme pour un vœu de Noël, {child_name} fredonne une berceuse. Les étoiles s'élèvent en spirale dorée, tissant la nuit de fils de lumière !

page_5.text_template: Allongés sur l'herbe tendre comme un édredon, {child_name} et les gardiens contemplent leur chef-d'œuvre scintillant au-dessus des sapins wallons.

page_6.text_template: Dans sa chambre aux murs de brique rouge, {child_name} sourit aux étoiles qui clignotent leurs mercis à travers les carreaux givrés de dentelle.

summary.text_template: Dans la forêt enchantée, {child_name} a découvert que sa voix porte la magie qui ramène les étoiles chez elles.

backCover.text_template: Chaque soir, {child_name} se rappelle que les petits gestes illuminent l'univers entier.

book.title_template: The Forest of Lost Stars with {child_name}

dedication.text_template: Who knows that even the smallest gestures can light up the whole world

page_1.text_template: Beneath the gnarled roots of the ancient oak, {child_name} finds a pale star whispering secrets of forgotten light.

page_2.text_template: A fox the color of cinnamon brick murmurs softly: "Come along, {child_name}, your sister stars sleep among the ferns!"

page_3.text_template: The owl with moon-bright eyes reveals her secret: "Stars float home to their palace when tender hearts offer them melodies."

page_4.text_template: Eyelids closed like making a Christmas wish, {child_name} hums a gentle lullaby. The stars rise in a golden spiral, weaving the night with threads of light!

page_5.text_template: Lying on grass soft as an eiderdown quilt, {child_name} and the forest guardians gaze at their sparkling masterpiece above the ancient pines.

page_6.text_template: In the red-brick bedroom, {child_name} smiles at the stars blinking their thanks through windowpanes traced with frost like lace.

summary.text_template: In the enchanted forest, {child_name} discovered that their voice carries the magic that brings stars back home.

backCover.text_template: Every evening, {child_name} remembers that small gestures illuminate the entire universe.

book.title_template: Het Bos van Verloren Sterren met {child_name}

dedication.text_template: Die weet dat zelfs de kleinste gebaren de hele wereld kunnen doen stralen

page_1.text_template: Tussen de kronkelige wortels van de oude eik vindt {child_name} een bleke ster die geheimen van vergeten licht fluistert.

page_2.text_template: Een vos zo rood als Brugse dakpannen fluistert zacht: "Kom mee, {child_name}, je zustersterren slapen tussen de varens!"

page_3.text_template: De uil met maanlichte ogen onthult haar geheim: "Sterren zweven naar huis, naar hun paleis, wanneer tedere harten melodieën zingen."

page_4.text_template: Oogleden gesloten alsof {child_name} een kerstwens doet, neuriet zacht een slaapliedje. De sterren stijgen op in een gouden spiraal en weven de nacht met lichtdraden!

page_5.text_template: Liggend op gras zacht als dons kijken {child_name} en de boswachters naar hun sprankelende meesterwerk boven de oude dennen.

page_6.text_template: In de slaapkamer met rode bakstenen muren glimlacht {child_name} naar de sterren die dankjewel knipperen door ruitjes berijpt als kant.

summary.text_template: In het betoverde bos ontdekte {child_name} dat de eigen stem de magie draagt die sterren naar huis brengt.

backCover.text_template: Elke avond onthoudt {child_name} dat kleine gebaren het hele universum doen stralen.

style_rules: Premium watercolor technique with soft, flowing brushstrokes reminiscent of Belgian artistic tradition
Moonlit forest palette with deep blues, silver highlights, and warm golden star-glow
Dreamy, atmospheric rendering with gentle light diffusion
Rich textural details in tree bark, moss, and forest floor
Luminous star effects with subtle sparkle and warm radiance
Cozy, intimate scale appropriate for bedtime reading
Belgian winter evening ambiance with frosted windows and warm interior lighting
visualBible.palette: Deep forest blues and teals, moonlight silver, warm amber star-glow, rich earth browns, soft sage greens, Belgian brick reds, warm golden interior light
visualBible.lighting: Gentle moonlight filtering through canopy, warm golden glow from stars, soft ambient forest light, cozy Belgian home lighting
compositionRules: Child positioned prominently but naturally within scene
Stars as focal light sources drawing the eye
Organic, curved lines following natural forest forms
Intimate framing creating cozy, safe feeling
Balanced negative space to avoid visual clutter

identityRules: Child with large, expressive hazel-brown eyes showing natural wonder and gentle curiosity
Soft, wavy chestnut-brown hair reaching just past the ears, with natural tousled texture
Medium-fair complexion with rosy cheeks from outdoor adventure
Wearing a cozy forest-green wool cardigan with wooden buttons over cream-colored clothing
Average height and proportional build typical for ages 4-7, neither tall nor short
Gentle, slightly rounded facial features conveying innocence and determination
Small hands often positioned in wonder or gentle interaction with magical elements
heroBible.characterDesign: A gentle, curious child aged 4-7 with large hazel-brown eyes full of natural wonder, soft wavy chestnut hair with tousled texture, medium-fair skin with naturally rosy cheeks, wearing a cozy forest-green wool cardigan with wooden buttons over cream clothes, expressing quiet determination mixed with pure awe at the magic around them
forbiddenDrift: Hair color must remain consistent chestnut-brown, never darker or lighter
Eye color must stay hazel-brown, never blue, green, or pure brown
The forest-green cardigan with wooden buttons must appear in every scene
Facial structure and proportions cannot change between scenes
No dramatic emotion shifts - maintain gentle wonder and curiosity only
Hand gestures must remain small and gentle, never dramatic or adult-like
Skin tone and rosy cheek coloring must remain constant throughout

sceneDefinitions.midground: ancient forest trees with glowing elements
sceneDefinitions.background: deep night sky with scattered stars

soft moss and natural forest elements

imageGeneration.negativePromptDefault: text, words, letters, writing, captions, harsh lighting, photorealistic, digital art, scary imagery, dark threatening atmosphere

rules: All locales must be semantically aligned
No text should appear within generated images
Hero character appearance must remain consistent
All scenes must be bedtime-safe and gentle
Premium watercolor style must be maintained throughout
Gender-neutral language required across all locales
Belgian cultural elements must be present

editorialScore.rationale: Strong emotional arc with clear discovery-and-return structure, climactic moment on page_4, culturally appropriate for Belgian market, excellent bedtime story qualities

imageabilityScore.rationale: Highly visual scenes with clear composition, magical forest setting provides rich visual opportunities, star effects and watercolor style well-specified

heroConsistencyScore.rationale: Detailed character design with specific appearance rules, comprehensive forbidden drift list, consistent emotional range specified

localeCompletenessScore.rationale: Complete translations for FR/EN/NL with semantic alignment, culturally appropriate adaptations, consistent emotional tone across languages
